properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v2 v5 v6 v7 v5 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh, I can feel redemption on the wind Forgiveness like the tide rollin' in Taking up the space where shame has lived Receiving all that You died to give

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let the wind blow Let the tide roll Till the earth knows You're a God of love Let my dry bones Sing a new song All the glory To the God of love Hey!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh, I can see a valley of dry bones Rattling, moving bone to bone You breathe a breath of life into our lungs Marching on our knees, we march to love

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Revival's in the air Well, catch it if you can He's moving on the wind The dawn is breaking Oh, lift your eyes to see He's better than you dreamed With everything you lost Love's returning

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Revival's in the air Well, catch it if you can He's moving on the wind The dawn is breaking Oh, lift your eyes to see He's better than you dreamed And everything you lost Love's returning

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Love's returning Love's returning Love's returning

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Let the wind blow Let the tide roll Till the earth knows You're a God of love Let my dry bones Sing a new song All the glory To the God of love All the glory To the God of love All the glory To the God of love
